commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a cron-scoped preserved-output hook for command execution, prepends preserved action-required lines to cron command summaries, and redacts those summaries for announce and webhook delivery.

PR surface: Source +221, Tests +140. Total +361 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. By source inspection, current main tail-truncates command output in runCommandWithTimeout and runCronCommandJob builds the cron summary from that tail; I did not run a live current-main cron job in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human review or contributor follow-up because current-head proof is stale and the remaining cron_changed security-boundary fix must be repaired or explicitly accepted before merge.
